query:
SELECT ce.id, u.email, c.title 
FROM course_enrollments ce 
JOIN users u ON ce.userId = u.id 
JOIN courses c ON ce.courseId = c.id 
WHERE u.email = 'student@test.com' AND c.title LIKE '%Old Testament%'
command:

JOIN courses c ON ce.courseId = c.id 
WHERE u.email = 'student@test.com' AND c.title LIKE '%Old Testament%'
